# harness_fme_environment (Data Source)

Look up a Harness FME (Split) environment by name within the workspace for a Harness organization and project. The provider resolves the workspace ID from `org_id` and `project_id` on each read.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a Split environment by name within the FME workspace for a Harness org and project.
data "harness_fme_environment" "production" {
  org_id     = "organization_id"
  project_id = "project_id"
  name       = "Production"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the Split environment in the workspace (e.g. `Production`).
- `org_id` (String) Harness organization identifier.
- `project_id` (String) Harness project identifier.

### Read-Only

- `environment_id` (String) The Split environment ID (same as `id`).
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `production` (Boolean) Whether this is a production environment in Split.
